race.comment: SWEXAN (4) jumped from an outside gate last time so pushed forward, found the lead, and kept going to score a comfortable win. Skips a grade but the only one in winning form and from a better draw can make it back to back wins. The rest of the chances all come through the same race behind Mystery Minute here last time. YES I BELIEVE (9) was having first run for the new yard and got back but wound up late for fourth behind Mystery Minute in a nice return. Fitter and can improve sharply. KUNAPIPI (6) raced on speed in the same race and placed third. Going well and looks a leading chance again. UNDERCOVER SNIPER (3) ran fifth in the same race. Was a winner the start prior and can do better. From the same race HILLSIDE HORACE (8) was sixth and is hard to beat on best figures.
